Describe the change and the target workflow.

## Testing

python -m pytest -q

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit proprietary binaries, decrypted payloads, private symbols, secrets, or large generated outputs.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I documented optional external-tool requirements.
- [ ] I kept non-LLM fallback behavior where LLM assistance is involved.
